utterances.speaker: Tony
utterances.text: Wow ! That is ah , that is pretty nice !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You will have to pardon my roommate , he wanted to marry this .

utterances.speaker: Tony
utterances.text: We do not have 50 bucks , but would you be willing to trade for it ? We have got a canoe .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know , I , I really do not think we need a canoe .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I really do not think we need a canoe .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: All right , just , just take the entertainment center , and then when you get home , throw the canoe away !

utterances.speaker: Peter
utterances.text: We are not throwing it away ! I built that canoe !

emotion_cause.span: 8_We are not throwing it away ! I built that canoe !
